task_completion.description: Verify that the crash in the percent button logic is fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Android Studio, look at `CalcActivity.kt`. The `onPercentPressed` function should use `toDoubleOrNull()` instead of `toDouble()`, or include an `isEmpty()` check or try-catch block to prevent crashes on empty input.

task_completion.description: Verify that the crash in the negate (+/-) button logic is fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Android Studio, look at `CalcActivity.kt`. The `onNegatePressed` function should use `toDoubleOrNull()` instead of `toDouble()`, or include an `isEmpty()` check or try-catch block.

task_completion.description: Verify that the calculation history display is increased to 10 entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In `CalcActivity.kt`, look for the history update logic. The code should show `history.takeLast(10)` instead of `history.takeLast(5)`.

task_completion.description: Verify that a visual indicator for stored memory values is implemented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for modifications in `activity_calc.xml` adding a new UI element (like a TextView for memory) AND/OR code in `CalcActivity.kt` that updates a UI element when memory functions (`memStore`, `memRecall`, etc.) are called.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project compiles successfully after changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Build' tool window at the bottom of Android Studio. It should display a 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message or a green checkmark indicating the Gradle build finished without errors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Android Studio for editing and building.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE interface being actively used to edit files and run Gradle builds, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the build output is genuine and belongs to the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Build tool window should show tasks related to the CalculatorApp (e.g., app:assembleDebug) and not be spoofed text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually fixed the logic rather than hardcoding a bypass.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code changes should address the underlying issues (e.g., safe parsing, updating history size) rather than just disabling the buttons or hardcoding a fake history string.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The baseline code has unsafe `toDouble()` calls in `onPercentPressed` and `onNegatePressed` functions in `CalcActivity.kt`, causing crashes. The fix requires reverting to `toDoubleOrNull()` or adding safety checks. The history display size is hardcoded as `history.takeLast(5)` in `CalcActivity.kt` and must be changed to 10. The baseline layout `activity_calc.xml` lacks any memory indicator, but `CalcEngine.kt` has memory functions (`memStore`, `memRecall`, `memAdd`, `memClear`). The agent must add a UI element and wire it up. The project must compile successfully. Scoring: Bug1=15, Bug2=15, History=15, Memory=20, Build=35.
